name: ass

scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix backend exec prisma generate -- --schema backend/prisma/schema.prisma && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.build:frontend: npm --prefix frontend2 ci && npm --prefix frontend2 run build

description: TokenTrade is a working real-time crypto trading simulator with a live Next.js frontend, GraphQL backend, Redis-backed order worker, PostgreSQL persistence, and Binance market data.
